scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix generator install && python3 -m venv generator/.venv && generator/.venv/bin/pip install -r generator/requirements-dev.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.package: npm run build:web && npm --prefix generator run package
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && npm --prefix generator run deploy --
